recent_announcements.summary: Adani Power Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on July 22, 2026. |SUBJECT: Outcome of Board Meeting

Tips Music Limited has informed the Exchange about Deferred the proposal for the Buyback of fully paid-up equity shares of the Company. Significant increase in volume has been observed in Meghmani Organics Limited.
